author: Samuel Vaillant
subject: refactor: rely on InstantSearch highlighting helpers (algolia/vue-instantsearch#730)
body:
This PR updates the implementation of `ais-hightlight` & `ais-snippet` to leverage the helpers provided by InstantSearch.js. The implementation of those helpers is exactly what we have inside Vue InstantSearch. It doesn't work with `escape-HTML="false"` but it never did. It's not a regression in that sense.

We should update how the highlighting is implemented inside InstantSearch.js to have something more flexible (maybe like [React InstantSearch](https://github.com/algolia/react-instantsearch/blob/master/packages/react-instantsearch-core/src/core/highlight.js) does). At least once we update the InstantSearch.js implementation Vue will benefit from it.
